channel.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
channel.description:
Hi folks, we wanted to share with you our latest news (just in case you missed it!): **Frontity is joining Automattic**, the parent company of WordPress.com, WooCommerce, Jetpack and Tumblr, among many other great products.
You can read the full announcement post here: https://frontity.org/blog/frontity-is-joining-automattic/
We also prepared this Q&A page to address some of the questions you might have: https://frontity.org/frontity-automattic-qa/
Thank you for your continued support, and for being a part of this great community! We'll keep you posted about any important updates.

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: marymekins3
item.description:
There are alternatives, like faustjs based on react already. This would be an opportune moment for a fork based on the faster and lighter sveltejs framework.

Hope frontity doesn’t die a silent death, since the updates have slowed down and the team has been reassigned to work on Gutenberg instead.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: marek.maurizio
item.description:
It was a great project, let’s hope it inspires some great forks.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Hi @Reyes, thanks for the reply. And yes I am also looking for a positive future for Frontity.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @santoshdevnath15, we understand that there’s some uncertainty while we help to transition the project, but we feel positive about this opportunity and the possibilities of Frontity Framework. This can help bring more participation and discussions, which can also make the project better.

While our team explores the opportunities around Gutenberg and full site editing, anyone interested in contributing to the current Frontity codebase can reach out to us.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Congrats. But have some confusion. Will, we do not get any official frontity updates in future? There are a lot of core packages that need to make the frontity better.

I don’t know what to say. This is good news or bad news for frontity

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity is Joining Automattic
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi folks, we wanted to share with you our latest news (just in case you missed it!): Frontity is joining Automattic, the parent company of WordPress.com, WooCommerce, Jetpack and Tumblr, among many other great products.

You can read the full announcement post here:

Frontity – 30 Aug 21

Frontity is joining Automattic

We're excited to announce that Frontity has been acquired by Automattic, the parent company of WordPress.com, WooCommerce, Tumblr and more.

We also prepared this Q&A page to address some of the questions you might have:

Frontity

Frontity Acquired by Automattic Q&A - Frontity.org

Frontity is joining Automattic. We understand that you may have questions regarding the acquisition. Here are a few answers.

Thank you for your continued support, and for being a part of this great community! We’ll keep you posted about any important updates.

Read full topic
